createModalIntro: Pick a library type, then initialize manifest.json and library.sqlite in an empty folder.
createModalIntroEmbedded: Pick an existing project folder to embed as a library in-place: files stay put; metadata lives in a subfolder.
archiveOptionDesc: Copies files into the library on import; portable and backup-friendly.
catalogOptionDesc: Metadata and thumbnails only; relink if sources move. Can upgrade to full later.
embeddedOptionDesc: Turn an existing folder into a library in-place; files are not copied. Metadata and thumbnails live in a subfolder.
panelArchiveDesc: Full library: copies files into items/ on import.
panelCatalogDesc: Catalog: metadata only; sources stay in place. Upgrade to full later.
panelEmbeddedDesc: Embedded: folder becomes library in-place; files not copied; relative paths for portability.
embeddedCreateConfirm: Turn the selected folder into an embedded library in-place? Files are not copied or moved. Continue?
fingerprintDesc: Detects duplicates on import. Scan assets missing fingerprints manually.
upgradeConfirm: Copy or hard-link all accessible referenced assets into the library and upgrade to full library?
importConfirmCatalogMerge:
Merge from catalog library "{{path}}" into the current catalog?

Non-localized entries merge as references; localized entries in A will create or complete local copies in B (same hash and B already localized skips duplicate disk use). Continue?
importConfirmArchiveImport:
Import tags, folders, and assets from full library "{{path}}"?

Duplicates merge by content fingerprint and receive a source-library tag. Continue?
importCatalogStats: Local added {{local}} · Reference added {{ref}} · Localized on import {{localized}} · Local duplicate skipped {{skippedLocal}}
recentListHint: Current and recent libraries are stored in active-library.json under the app data folder (separate from library folders).
importCatalogStatsDetailed: Local added {{local}} · Reference added {{ref}} · Localized on import {{localized}} · Skipped localized duplicate {{skippedLocal}}
embeddedImportResult: Embedded library created: Added {{added}} · Duplicates skipped {{skipped}} · Failed {{failed}}
